description_long: This is a modern, box-shaped house with a flat roof and a minimalist exterior. The facade features a mix of large floor-to-ceiling windows and smaller rectangular windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house is surrounded by a few coniferous trees, suggesting a landscaped urban or suburban setting. The exterior walls are finished in contrasting light and dark tones, enhancing the geometric lines of the structure. The interior layout is visible from above, revealing multiple rooms and open spaces. The main entryway is simple, with a single door and no prominent porch or overhang.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, minimalist lines, and a mix of light and dark exterior walls.
description_view_0: This view shows the dark-toned side of the house with several windows and a large glass section revealing the interior.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the light-colored facade, the main entry door, and two small trees near the entrance.
description_view_2: The rear of the house features a wide glass window and a cluster of trees, with a mostly light exterior and several smaller windows.
description_view_3: Another dark-toned side is visible, with multiple windows and a clear view into the interior layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single door with no porch or overhang, flanked by small decorative trees
